form.formComment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 8th (Fr2) over 1690m at this track beaten 17 m by Postit Lafite (2:06.10) in 2yo MAIDEN on August 5 at $34. Has been in work for a little while but after a lengthy break may need the run.

form.formComment: Two back was seventh after being driven well back, behind Miss Doobee at this track over 1690m in a MAIDEN on March 24 at $7.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing third after being driven well back, after a quick start, behind Pearl Of Philtra at Echuca over 1755m in a MAIDEN on April 5 at $4.60. Expected to feature again.

Inconvenienced at approx. 700m when Draw The Curtain galloped.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr4) over 2150m after showing early speed at Bendigo beaten 20 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:35.30) in 3yo 10 0K on March 25 at $26. Showed ability the run before when she won by 6 m when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (2:42.50) beating Interestinme in MAIDEN on March 17 at $2.90 at the bell was leading 5.39. Can bounce back.
